mapper.select: SELECT * FROM KPI WHERE PROJ_NO = #{projNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY KPI_NO ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO KPI ( KPI_NO, KPI_PARENT_NO, PROJ_NO, REG_EMP_NO, KPI_NM, KPI_CN, KPI_TYPE_CD, START_DTM, END_DTM, USE_YN, REG_DTM, PROGRESS_RATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_KPI_NO.NEXTVAL,
NULL #{kpiParentNo}
,
#{projNo}, #{regEmpNo}, #{kpiNm}, #{kpiCn}, #{kpiTypeCd}, #{startDtm}, #{endDtm}, 'Y', SYSDATE, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE KPI SET KPI_NM = #{kpiNm}, KPI_CN = #{kpiCn}, KPI_TYPE_CD = #{kpiTypeCd}, PROGRESS_RATE = #{progressRate}, START_DTM = #{startDtm}, END_DTM = #{endDtm}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE KPI_NO = #{kpiNo}
UPDATE KPI SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE KPI_NO = #{kpiNo}
mapper.select: SELECT KPI_NO, KPI_PARENT_NO, PROJ_NO, KPI_NM, PROGRESS_RATE, REG_DTM, USE_YN FROM KPI WHERE KPI_PARENT_NO = #{parentNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY KPI_NO ASC
